title: Enchantment Splitter
description: Let's players split Enchantments off of a Book with Multiple Enchantments to another book!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bneLgR_R8OI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Extract individual enchantments from multi-enchanted books using an anvil. Split off one random enchantment into a new book while preserving the original — minus the extracted enchantment. Includes XP cost balancing and curse protection.

- Easy to use, just drop it into your plugins folder and you are good to go!
- XP Cost is equal to 1 level per rarity level of enchantment being split off.
- Entirely random enchantment is chosen.
- Single enchanted books cannot be split.
- Enchanted Books with Curse enchantments, such as Binding or Vanishing cannot be split!
- Get Support on my Discord: [Pick's Plugins](https://discord.gg/GRUTuSeSUK)
